title: High Council (Galactic Alliance)

The '''High Council''', or '''Special Council''', was the ruling council of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]]. The High Council was unique in its form, containing a distinct balance of six [[New Jedi Order|Jedi]] and six [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] leaders.

==History==
The High Council was established by [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]] [[Cal Omas]] during his reforms prior to the creation of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]],<ref name="Destiny's Way" /> possibly named or based after the earlier [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic High Council|High Council]].<ref name="SOTP">''[[Specter of the Past]]''</ref> [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] was an instrumental force in the establishment of the Council. The Council was created in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]] on the planet [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]] and governed the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] until the end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|war against the Yuuzhan Vong]]. The Council continued to govern from [[Denon/Legends|Denon]] and [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] following the conclusion of the war.

While the [[Galactic Alliance Advisory Council]] was the primary executive body of the Galactic Alliance, the High Council was considered better suited for the prosecution of the war, and many important officials often brief the council, including [[Ayddar Nylykerka]]. Nylykerka became so important during the war, that he was granted temporary status on the Council. Nylykerka's position on the Council was removed with the end of the war.

All sessions were recorded by a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]], which also served as a translator. [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] initially served in this position, though a new protocol droid was assigned following the Yuuzhan Vong War.

After the [[Swarm War]], Luke Skywalker dissolved the Jedi's role on the High Council, feeling that the Jedi should not make policy for the Galactic Alliance. The new system would have the Order's [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] meet and discuss events with the Chief of State. The High Council thus became obsolete, and the [[Galactic Alliance Advisory Council]] replaced it as the key body in the Alliance.

==Yuuzhan Vong War==
The original High Council governed from [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]] until the end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|war against the Yuuzhan Vong]] in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]] from [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]].

*[[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]] [[Cal Omas]]
*[[Minister of State]] [[Releqy A'Kla]]
*[[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] [[Sien Sovv]]
*[[Minister of Justice (Galactic Alliance)|Minister of Justice]] [[Ta'laam Ranth]]
*[[Director of Galactic Alliance Intelligence|Director of Intelligence]] [[Dif Scaur]]
*[[Galactic Alliance Senate|Senatorial representative]] [[Triebakk]]
*[[Director of Galactic Alliance Fleet Intelligence|Director of Fleet Intelligence]] [[Ayddar Nylykerka]]
*[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]
*[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Cilghal]]
*[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kenth Hamner]]
*[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kyp Durron]]
*[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Tresina Lobi]]
*[[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Saba Sebatyne]]

Following the end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|war against the Yuuzhan Vong]], [[Sien Sovv]] and [[Dif Scaur]] both resigned, primarily over the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|fall of Coruscant]] and the [[Alpha Red]] scandal, respectively. [[Ayddar Nylykerka]] was not a part of the first meeting of the High Council, but was added before the end of the war.
